title: pisum sativum subsp. brevipedunculatum
intro: Pisum sativum subsp. brevipedunculatum, also known as garden pea or green pea, is a subspecies of the Pisum sativum plant, which is an annual legume native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pisum sativum subsp. brevipedunculatum include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and improve cognitive function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Pisum sativum subsp. brevipedunculatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
